creator: salfrancl@yahoo.es
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Leinier Cruz Salfran
>Organization:	IPI 'Jose M. Maceo Grajales'
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	ports/147649: textproc/iso8879: WRKDIR error on Tinderbox
>Severity:	critical
>Priority:	high
>Category:	ports
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	8.0-RELEASE-p2
>Environment:	FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Tue Jun  8 14:38:14 CDT 2010    root@tinderbox.ipigto.rimed.cu:/usr/src/sys/magic/kernel/path

>Description:
hello .. i solved this situation

how can i did that?

I examined the line that invoke extraction on 'Makefile' .. originally it looks like this:


@${UNZIP_CMD} ${EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS} ${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} -d ${INSTDIR}


then I examined each variable to get an idea of what command will be invoked and I saw the error was on 'EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS' variable

[root@sasuke /usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/ports-all/ports/textproc/iso8879]# PORTSDIR=/usr/local/tinderbox/portstrees/ports-all/ports make -V EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS
-dc


there is a conflict:  -dc  <==> -d ${INSTDIR}

well I removed that variable and all works .. here is the tinderbox log and i attach the unified diff:

>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:

--- Makefile.orig	2010-06-08 14:43:42.000000000 -0400
+++ Makefile	2010-06-08 14:43:48.000000000 -0400
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@
 	@[ -d ${INSTDIR} ] || ${MKDIR} ${INSTDIR}
 
 do-install:
-	@${UNZIP_CMD} ${EXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS} ${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} -d ${INSTDIR}
+	@${UNZIP_CMD} ${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} -d ${INSTDIR}
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${FILESDIR}/catalog ${INSTDIR}/catalog
 	@${CHMOD} ${SHAREMODE} ${INSTDIR}/*
 	@${CHOWN} -R ${SHAREOWN}:${SHAREGRP} ${INSTDIR}
